name: resizable-handle
visual_summary: The resizable-handle is a compact UI element that provides a small handle to resize objects. It is typically used in scenarios where the user needs to adjust the size of an object on screen, such as a grid layout or a responsive container. This component is ideal for users who require fine-grained control over the size of elements in their applications.
